summary: Prediction/control framing can erase receptivity and make contact feel like compulsory mastery rather than participation.
Existing receptivity-buffer review surfaces should classify high-entropy low-pressure habitable contact as sandbox/review-ready without applying control.
A live Receptivity Window, prediction-weight suppression, `shared_trace` weighting, or regulator behavior change is live substrate/control authority and remains V2-gated.
